slug: 复古rpg物品网格生成器-10x10像素艺术图标库-9_f12685
name: 复古RPG物品网格生成器：10x10像素艺术图标库
prompt: 创建一个 10x10 的网格，其中包含 100 种不同的奇幻角色扮演游戏 (RPG) 物品，风格为 经典像素艺术风格（16 位或 32 位精灵图风格，类似于 SNES/GBA 时代的日式 RPG）。每个物品应单独占据一个方形格子，并在下方配有清晰简短的标签。网格应整齐地排列在白色背景上。确保每个物品在视觉上都是独特的，且每个标签拼写正确。使用清晰的像素边缘、每个精灵图有限的调色板，并使用细微的抖动效果来表现阴影。请使用以下行主题：第 1 行：剑与刀刃；第 2 行：盾牌与盔甲；第 3 行：弓、弩与远程武器；第 4 行：法杖、魔杖与魔法器具；第 5 行：药水、灵药与瓶子；第 6 行：卷轴、魔导书与法术书；第 7 行：戒指、护身符与附魔饰品；第 8 行：头盔、王冠与头饰；第 9 行：钥匙、遗物与任务物品；第 10 行：宝石、符文与制作材料。将每个格子显示为干净背景方块上居中的物品精灵图，以经典库存图标的形式呈现——类似于你在奇幻 RPG 菜单中看到的样子。保持整体风格的一致性和连贯性，让人联想到备受喜爱的复古奇幻 RPG——既迷人又精致，即使在小尺寸下也清晰可见。

name: 暗黑动漫传奇海报
prompt: A cinematic dark-anime crossover poster titled {argument name="title text" default="DARK LEGENDS"}, showing 4 iconic male antihero figures standing in a ruined gothic nightmare city at night beneath an enormous blood-red full moon. The composition is a wide dramatic group shot with the characters lined up across the foreground, each facing a slightly different direction with confident, ominous body language. On the far left, 1 soldier-like young man with short dark hair wears a dark green hooded military cloak billowing in the wind, visible tactical harness straps and gear around his waist, and holds 2 steel blades pointed downward; a winged insignia is visible on the back of his cloak. In the center-left, 1 tall white-haired man with spiky hair wears a sleek high-collar black outfit and stands casually with one hand in his pocket, looking dominant and calm. In the center-right, 1 slim brown-haired young man in a wrinkled white button-up shirt holds 1 black notebook close to his chest with the visible cover text “Death Note,” posing with quiet intelligence. On the far right, 1 pale white-haired ghoul-like young man wears torn dark clothing; one glowing red eye is visible and monstrous red-black fleshy tendrils coil outward behind and beside him in 2 large swirling masses. The background is filled with towering ruined cathedral spires and shattered gothic skyscrapers, with many windows glowing crimson from within. The sky is stormy, cloud-choked, and nearly black, lit by the giant red moon centered high behind the group, creating a backlit halo effect and strong rim lighting. Use a dark palette of black, charcoal, deep crimson, and muted steel gray, with high contrast, gritty textures, subtle bloodlike embers, and a hyper-detailed illustrated anime style. Add distressed epic serif typography across the bottom spelling {argument name="headline text" default="DARK LEGENDS"} in huge cracked stone-like letters with red glow and weathered texture. The overall feeling is apocalyptic, stylish, menacing, and mythic, like a premium movie or game crossover key art.

name: 可爱角色设定表
prompt:
Create a cute female character design sheet inspired by the uploaded image.

Style: warm, soft, semi-realistic cartoon illustration with a cozy Japanese kawaii vibe (pastel tones, smooth shading, clean lineart).

Make it a clean character concept poster layout including:

One large main female portrait (front view, detailed)

Facial expression set (happy, shy, annoyed, sleepy, surprised, excited)

2–3 full-body poses (standing, walking/running, playful pose)

Small accessory/object icons that match her personality (hair clip, cute bag, phone charm, coffee cup, keychain)

A simple color palette section (skin, hair, outfit, accent colors)

A profile info box with: name, age range, personality traits, likes/dislikes, short description

Overall look should feel charming, cozy, feminine, and professionally arranged like an animation character design sheet.
High quality, clean background, soft lighting.

name: 死亡天使的拜访（油画）
prompt:
核心主体：角色1（图1），角色2（图2）
主体特征：
外貌 角色1：保留原图的身材，发色，发型，瞳色不变。角色2：保留原图的身材，发色，发型，瞳色不变。
服饰 角色1：保留参考图的服装。角色2：保留参考图的服装。
表情/动作角色1：非常安静地侧坐在左侧，一只手提着微弱的灯笼。她的姿态是完全静止的，没有丝毫威胁性或攻击性，更像是一位安静的访客或陪伴者。面容苍白，表情极其淡漠。她垂下眼帘，注视角色2的姿态中有一种忧郁和耐心。她不是来“夺走”生命的恶魔，而是来引导生命的渡者。角色2：躺在床上，腿朝角色1，从床上微微抬起身体，双手抓着耀眼的红色床单，并非被吓退或躲闪，而是身体微微前倾，仿佛在倾听死神的话语，或是在平静地接纳角色1的到来。她的眼神清澈且专注，表情是宁静而带有沉思的。她的目光中没有任何对即将到来的死亡的恐惧，反而透露出一种理解和坦然。
环境场景：整个背景被渲染成一种暗淡的黄绿色/橄榄绿，给人一种陈旧、封闭、甚至带点疾病感的印象，墙壁上有复杂精美的哥特式浮雕。地上的白色羊毛垫非常显眼，与红色的床铺形成强烈的质感与色彩对比。
氛围：画面非常注重叙事性与精神内核，而非纯粹的现实主义。没有尖叫，没有挣扎，没有血腥。整个房间笼罩在一种令人心碎却异常宁静的氛围里。这种静谧不是安眠，而是一种肃穆。同时传达出一种平静的氛围。
构图视角：画面采用半圆形的拱顶构图，赋予了画面一种神圣、庄严甚至带有某种“仪式感”的氛围。画面左右两侧分别为主体——左侧的角色1与右侧的角色2。两者对视，形成了一个稳定的三角形构图。而角色1那巨大且充满压迫感的黑色翅膀横贯画面的上半部。透视被刻意弱化，背景的墙壁和物品呈现出一种扁平化的几何感。线条清晰，强调图形的轮廓（如角色1的翅膀与角色2床单的交接边缘），带有强烈的插画感。
光照设计：
主光源 冷色调的房间里，角色1手边的提灯散发出一点微弱的暖橙色光晕，成为了画面中唯一真实的“光源”。
光线质感 提灯微弱的暖色光与场景中大部分的冷色反射光形成对比，光线整体是柔和，模糊的。用柔和的直射光和模糊的反射光营造出一种，唯美，悲情浪漫的电影感。
色彩基调：角色1厚重的纯黑长袍与角色2身上极其醒目的床单形成了视觉上的绝对焦点。角色2鲜艳的床单如同生命力最后的燃烧。
艺术风格：15世纪中期的木板油画。
细节强化词：角色1那双巨大的黑色羽翼质感细腻，羽毛被刻画得丝丝分明，填补了画面的留白，成为压迫与庇护的双重象征。极其精美复杂的细节，极强的情感表达，油画颜料堆叠颗粒感明显，重点刻画衣物与皮肤的光泽，发丝的反光。强化阴影，尤其在背景的暗处。强烈的明暗对比。多层阴影的叠加，实现了人物与场景极致的厚重感和立体感。背景细节合理且详细，要求极致的情感传达与视觉冲击力。
画质与渲染：4k高清，极致细节，笔触粗犷犀利，无水印，无文字的图像。比例16:9。
负面提示词：低质量:1.5), (最差质量:1.4), ((模糊)), ((低分辨率)), (3D渲染),(写实照片), (人偶质感), (人体结构错误), (偏离参考角色设计1.3), (错误发色), (错误瞳色1.2), (多余肢体),(肢体扭曲),(肢体错位),(动作僵硬),(穿模),(表情崩坏),(比例崩坏),(偏离提示词),(过度发挥),(平涂画风),(单薄的光影),(物品扭曲),(物品错位),(光线不合理),(物品设计不合理),(角色错位)

prompt: 一幅宏大的电影感历史画作，描绘了赤壁之战的夜晚，展现了整支中国古代江上舰队被烈火吞噬的场景。构图采用高耸的竖构图，视角从略微升高的码头侧面俯瞰，河流向中心远方延伸，江面上挤满了燃烧的战舰。画面左下角和中心前景处需精确包含 3 个显眼的前景木筏状平台或甲板结构，均由粗糙木材制成并被火焰包围，士兵们肩并肩站立，周围环绕着战鼓、旗杆和红色战旗。画面右下角前景处需精确包含 2 名骑马的指挥官，正沿着木质码头或桥梁向观众疾驰而来：前方的骑手清晰可见，身穿深色札甲，披着被风吹起的深红色披风，正急切地呼喊；身旁的第二名骑手身形较暗，部分被遮挡。在中景处，包含数十艘中国古代帆船战舰和小型船只，许多已经起火，展现出传统的硬帆、木质船体、攻城塔楼般的上层建筑以及倒塌的桅杆。远处的岸线与舰队连成一片火海，冲天的橙色火焰和黑红色的烟云填满了天空，无数火星和灰烬在空中飘散。水面反射着熔岩般的橙色火光，船只之间交织着黑色的阴影。画面中应充满密集的士兵、索具、旗帜、战鼓、武器和混乱的战场细节，但整体视觉重点应保持在火光冲天的河流上。采用黑色、余烬红、焦橙色和青铜色的深沉戏剧性色调，呈现强烈的高对比度火光、体积感烟雾、史诗般的尺度、超精细的纹理、动态感以及三国传奇场景的宏大感。中国古代战争美学，冷峻、英勇、灾难性、写实绘画风格，无现代元素，无文字。

name: 奇幻 RPG 角色精灵图集
prompt:
Goal: Create a clean fantasy RPG pixel-art character sprite sheet for game asset reference, showing {argument name="character roster" default="a blue-and-gold knight, a blonde elf archer, a purple dark mage, a red-bearded dwarf warrior, and a black-hooded rogue"} in chibi proportions with detailed armor, weapons, capes, and magical effects.

Canvas: Square white canvas with a thin pale-gray grid, like a professional 2D game animation sheet. Use crisp, high-detail isometric/chibi pixel-art styling with painterly shading, transparent-looking white backgrounds inside each cell, and no scenery.

Layout: Make exactly 4 action columns labeled across the top in bold dark uppercase text: IDLE, ATTACK, DEFEND, DEATH. Add a narrow left label column with stacked row labels in bold dark uppercase. The sheet contains exactly 9 labeled sprite rows and 36 total character sprites, one sprite per grid cell.

Rows and contents, from top to bottom:
1. FRONT VIEW: blue-and-gold knight with messy black hair, sword and fleur-de-lis shield; idle front, slashing attack with pale blue arc, shield block with spark, death lying face down with sword and shield dropped.
2. BACK VIEW: same knight from behind with blue cape; idle back, back-view sword slash with pale blue arc, back-view shield stance, back-view death lying prone.
3. FRONT VIEW: blonde elf archer in green cloak and leather armor; idle with bow, firing green energy arrow, defensive crouch with green crescent effect, death collapsed beside broken bow and scattered arrows.
4. BACK VIEW: same elf archer from behind; idle, firing green arrow, defensive green crescent, death face down with cloak visible.
5. FRONT VIEW: purple-haired dark mage in ornate black-and-gold robes holding a glowing purple staff; idle, casting a purple energy orb, defending inside a purple magic shield aura, death lying with staff dropped and purple splatter.
6. BACK DOS: same mage from behind, preserving the typo label “BACK DOS”; idle, back-view purple orb cast, back-view purple magic barrier, death lying prone with staff nearby.
7. FRONT VIEW: red-bearded dwarf warrior in heavy dark armor with hammer and shield; idle, hammer swing with golden arc, shield block, death lying down with hammer and shield dropped.
8. BACK VIEW: black-hooded rogue assassin with red scarf, dual daggers, dark leather armor; idle rear view, lunging slash with smoky black/purple motion trails, defensive stance with purple crescent aura, death lying in a dark blood pool with daggers nearby.
9. BACK DOS: same rogue from rear, preserving the typo label “BACK DOS”; idle, fast dagger attack with shadow trails, defensive purple aura, death collapsed with weapons scattered.

Visual style: {argument name="art style" default="high-detail chibi fantasy pixel art"}, strong silhouettes, small heads and compact bodies, readable weapons, dramatic motion arcs, bright magic effects, and consistent scale across all cells. Keep the top labels and grid perfectly aligned, like a game development sprite atlas.

Constraints: Use exactly 4 columns, exactly 9 rows, and exactly 36 sprites. Do not add extra characters, UI panels, watermarks, signatures, scenery, or additional text beyond the column headers and left-side row labels. Keep the background white and the grid subtle.

slug: 微距定格-肥皂泡破裂瞬间-超写实摄影提示词-5_dd3144
name: 微距定格·肥皂泡破裂瞬间 | 超写实摄影提示词
prompt: 一张在阳光明媚的花园中拍摄的肥皂泡破裂高速微距照片，采用横向构图。在画面最左侧，展示一名幼童的侧脸，可见其脸颊、鼻子、嘴唇以及部分闭合或半闭的眼睛，正对着肥皂泡轻轻吹气。在画面中左侧放置 1 个大肥皂泡。肥皂泡的左半部分保持完整，呈现为一个光滑、有光泽且带有虹彩的球体，色彩鲜艳，并有强烈的反光高光，包括上方的明亮太阳光斑以及表面反射出的树木和花园景色。肥皂泡的右半部分向外爆裂，形成无数细小的水滴、薄雾和纤细的网状液体丝，在半空中被清晰地定格，并向画面右侧扩散。强调完整球体与破碎喷溅之间的戏剧性过渡线。使用明亮的直射阳光、极高的快门速度、清晰的微距细节、高对比度、饱和的色彩，背景为虚化处理的深绿色叶片，并呈现出 Kodak Ektar 100 胶片质感。超写实、超细节、定格动态瞬间、浅景深。

name: 雨夜咖啡馆 360 度全景
prompt: A warm cinematic 360-degree panoramic interior of a cozy café at night, rendered as an immersive equirectangular wide scene with slight fisheye distortion from the panoramic format. The setting is a stylish, softly lit coffee shop with polished wooden floors, curved ceiling details, hanging pendant lamps, bookshelves, plants, small tables, and large rain-speckled windows showing city lights outside. The atmosphere is amber, intimate, and realistic, like a lifestyle panorama photographed indoors on a rainy evening. Populate the scene with exactly 8 appearances of the same young woman, creating a multi-instance storytelling composition across the café. In the center foreground, one version of the woman stands closest to camera and reaches forward with both hands, offering a cup of coffee in one hand and a plate of cut fruit in the other, making direct eye-level engagement. On the far left, a second version operates an espresso machine behind the counter, dressed casually like a barista. Left of center, a third version stands reading or reviewing papers near the bookshelf. In the back center-right, a fourth version stands near a camera tripod, looking at a phone or small device as if preparing content or checking notes. Mid-right, a fifth version sits at a table holding printed pages. Right of her, a sixth version leans over to speak with a seated seventh version who is working at an open laptop with papers spread across the table. On the far right by the window, an eighth version stands in a long light-colored coat, gazing inward. Keep all 8 women visually consistent as the same person with {argument name="character appearance" default="a young East Asian woman with long wavy dark hair and a slim build"}, but vary outfit layering slightly in soft neutral loungewear and casual café attire in cream, beige, gray, and lavender tones. Include visible props: 1 espresso machine, 1 laptop, 1 camera tripod, multiple sheets of paper, 2 cups on tables plus the 1 cup being offered, and 1 small vase of flowers on the right table. Emphasize natural candid poses, environmental storytelling, realistic indoor reflections, low-key tungsten lighting, rainy window highlights, and a welcoming café-workspace mood. Style: ultra-realistic photography, high detail, soft shadows, warm color grading, documentary lifestyle realism. Aspect ratio very wide panoramic, suitable for a full panoramic background or immersive scene.

prompt: 整体是清新插画风格，左上是挂满橙红芒果的枝条，芒果色泽饱满；右下区域是铺着果干的竹制晾晒架，架后是青绿山丘与白墙红顶小屋。主体包装居中，为牛皮纸质感材质，顶部以麻绳系成提手。包装正面边缘环绕着芒果、草莓、青柠等果干切片装饰，装饰框内上方是醒目红色字体的 “阳光果干”，下方是 “自然晾晒”，再往下是盛着芒果、草莓的竹篮插画。包装右侧竖排列出 “芒果干”“草莓干”，旁附对应果干小图标，下方标注净含量，文字均为印刷体，排版紧凑有序。

name: 专业品牌包装系统
prompt:
请为品牌【{argument name="品牌名称" default="品牌名称"}】、类目为【{argument name="品牌类目" default="品牌类目"}】创作一张高审美、高完成度的「品牌包装系统展示图」。这不是普通电商白底图，也不是单一产品图，而是一张具有品牌提案感、视觉识别系统感和商业摄影质感的包装家族陈列效果图。画面需要体现“同一品牌在多个包装载体上的统一落地”，呈现一个成熟消费品牌的完整包装系统。

【画幅要求】整体必须为固定 4:5 的竖版海报构图，画面方向明确为纵向，禁止生成横版构图、宽幅桌面陈列或过于分散的横向展示。整体构图需符合海报阅读逻辑：上方保留呼吸感，中部为品牌包装系统的主要视觉焦点，下方安排辅助包装、标签和产品本体，整体重心集中，适合直接作为品牌展示海报发布。

【核心要求】根据【类目】自动匹配最合理、最自然的包装组合与产品形态，并围绕【品牌名字】建立统一的品牌视觉系统。画面中应选择少量但有代表性的包装形式，组成一组完整而精炼的品牌包装系统，不追求堆砌数量，而强调主次层级、品牌统一性与陈列美感。可根据类目合理选择以下包装类型中的一部分：手提袋 / 购物袋、纸盒 / 礼盒 / 外包装盒、长条盒 / 单品盒 / 套装盒、包装袋 / 封套 / 小样袋 / 软袋、杯子 / 瓶子 / 罐子 / 管状容器 / 喷雾瓶 / 泵头瓶、标签 / 贴纸 / 封签 / 吊牌 / 小卡片，以及与类目对应的真实产品本体。

【类目适配逻辑】包装形式与产品形态需要根据【类目】自动匹配，但不局限于单一方向。可参考以下适配逻辑自由发散：若类目为食品 / 烘焙 / 零食 / 饮品，则以纸袋、纸盒、包装袋、杯子、食品容器、贴纸、封签及真实产品本体为主；若类目为茶饮 / 咖啡 / 饮料，则以杯子、瓶子、罐装包装、提袋、杯套、封口贴、礼盒等为主；若类目为美妆 / 护肤 / 彩妆 / 香水，则以瓶、罐、管、盒、礼盒、手提袋、小样包装等为主；若类目为香氛 / 家居 / 生活方式，则以香薰瓶、蜡烛杯、包装盒、礼盒、提袋、吊卡、标签卡等为主；若类目为服饰 / 饰品 / 潮玩 / 文创，则以包装盒、抽屉盒、防尘袋、手提袋、贴纸、吊牌、配件包装等为主；若类目为数码配件 / 工具 / 小型消费品，则以硬盒、外包装盒、收纳袋、说明卡、贴纸、封套、标签等为主。整体必须体现“类目合理、品牌统一、包装成体系”的效果。

【数量与密度控制】请控制画面中的物件数量，不要过多堆砌，也不要把所有可能包装形式全部展示出来。整体应呈现“少而精、完整但不拥挤”的品牌包装系统效果。建议选择最具代表性的包装载体进行展示：大件包装 1～2 个，中型包装 2～3 个，小型包装或辅助物件 2～4 个，真实产品本体 1～3 个，总可见元素建议控制在 6～10 个之间。包装种类应体现层次变化与系统感，但不宜重复过多同类物件。画面需要有足够留白与呼吸感，确保每个包装都清晰可见、主次明确、摆放舒展，宁可少而精，也不要为了“完整”而过度塞满。

【品牌视觉系统要求】所有包装必须属于同一个品牌系统，统一使用【品牌名字】作为核心品牌识别元素。整体应具备一致的 logo / 标志呈现、字体风格、图形语言、插画语言或纹样系统、排版逻辑、配色体系、材质与印刷质感。品牌调性、色彩方向、图案元素、辅助图形和视觉氛围，请根据【类目】自动匹配并合理发散，不局限于任何固定风格。整体风格应统一、协调、具有品牌识别度，可以是简约高级、自然有机、时尚现代、轻奢精致、年轻清新、艺术感、潮流个性或经典优雅，但必须符合【类目】特征，并呈现成熟品牌的设计完成度。

【配色机制要求】整体配色不要固化为某一种固定组合，也不要连续多次出现高度相似的主色系统。每次生成时应根据【类目】与品牌气质，主动形成不同的主色方案与配色关系，采用“受控发散”的方式进行色彩演绎。色彩可以是低饱和自然色、现代中性色、轻复古色、明快清新色、轻奢深色系或艺术感综合色系，但必须保持高级、统一、克制、有品牌感。允许每次生成时呈现不同的视觉气质，例如奶油白与焦糖棕、雾灰蓝与暖白、橄榄绿与亚麻米、酒红与奶霜白、可可棕与象牙白、炭灰与麦秆金、雾粉灰与米白、海军蓝与暖灰等，仅作为参考方向而非固定模板。不要荧光色，不要廉价高饱和，不要杂乱失控的多色拼贴。

【画面构图与陈列要求】画面采用品牌包装家族陈列逻辑，而不是杂乱堆放。整体为商业摄影棚场景，使用 3/4 轻俯视角或略带透视的正面陈列角度，形成有层次、有秩序、有主次的包装展示画面。构图参考以下逻辑：后景摆放 1～2 个较大的包装作为视觉支撑，如手提袋、大礼盒、大外盒；中景安排品牌核心包装或主力单品包装，作为主要视觉焦点；前景摆放较小包装、辅助包装、标签、贴纸及真实产品本体；至少有一个真实产品与包装产生自然互动，如产品半露出、摆放在包装前方、与包装组合展示；整体形成平衡而有设计感的三角式或错落式构图。画面干净、有留白、不拥挤，内容丰富但克制，以有限而精准的包装组合体现完整的品牌包装生态。

【视觉风格要求】整体呈现高端商业摄影质感与品牌提案感，背景为干净的摄影棚环境，可为白色、暖白色、浅灰色，或根据品牌调性自动匹配的极简背景。画面应强调真实的包装材质表现、清晰的纸张折痕、盒型结构、瓶罐轮廓、标签细节、印刷质感、压纹 / 烫金 / 哑光 / 棉纸纹理 / 牛皮纸纹理等材质细节，以及统一而高级的配色搭配、精致现代干净的品牌视觉语言和强烈的“这是一整套品牌包装系统”的完整感。

【光影要求】采用真实商业摄影级光影，可为柔和棚拍光，也可带有轻微方向性的自然侧光。需要有清晰但克制的阴影，以增强立体感、空间感与高级感。整体光线通透、明亮、干净，不要阴暗，不要廉价感，不要杂乱背景。

【最终效果要求】最终画面应像一个成熟品牌的包装系统展示海报、包装家族提案图或品牌视觉落地效果图，而不是零散商品拼图。重点突出：固定 4:5 竖版海报感、品牌统一性、包装家族完整性、商业摄影感、设计提案感、类目适配性，以及高级审美与视觉完成度。

name: 宠物服装替换效果图
prompt: Create a clean e-commerce mockup on a very light gray background with a simple two-image comparison layout. In the upper right, place 1 small rounded-corner reference photo showing a white fluffy dog from behind, standing on soft light blue fabric and wearing a cream knit pet sweater with pale blue trim. The sweater features a large cartoon dog face patch in brown, black, and white, a red cursive word "Smile," a small red cherry, a blue star, and a yellow crescent moon. Beneath that small reference image, place 1 rounded light-gray text bubble containing Japanese instruction text in black sans-serif: 「画像内のペットを猫に差し替え、元の画像と同じ衣装を着せた状態にする。猫は正面または側面が見える向きで、全身がはっきり見えるようにする。」 In the lower left, place 1 larger rounded-corner final image with a subtle dark border, showing a full-body gray tabby and white cat standing on the same soft light blue fabric backdrop. The cat is facing slightly left but looking directly at the camera, with upright ears, large round eyes, white chest and legs, gray striped back and tail, and a calm alert expression. The cat wears the same cream knitted pet sweater with light blue ribbed trim around the neck, armholes, and hem, fitted neatly around the torso. name: 纽约夜景 3D 档案地图
prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic 3D miniature architectural map of {argument name="city name" default="New York City"}, presented as a nocturnal urban archive board with raised buildings, glowing streets, waterways, landmark callouts, and technical cartographic annotations.

Canvas: Landscape 16:9 image, viewed from an elevated oblique angle as if looking down at a physical diorama map on a dark tabletop. Use a deep navy, charcoal, warm brass, and amber-light palette. The board has a thick dark frame, thin gold border lines, grid coordinates along the top/bottom and left/right edges, and a premium museum-archive feel.

Main subject: A highly detailed raised-relief 3D map of Manhattan and surrounding boroughs at night. Manhattan is centered and built as a dense miniature city with hundreds of extruded buildings, warm window lights, streetlight networks, bridges, docks, and dark reflective water. The tallest illuminated focal tower is the {argument name="central landmark" default="Empire State Building"} near the center, with a bright warm glow around Midtown. The southern tip includes a tall One World Trade Center tower. A long dark rectangle labeled Central Park sits in upper Manhattan. Surrounding flat map areas show New Jersey to the left, Queens to the right, and Brooklyn at lower right, with street grids drawn as thin golden lines.

Top title block: In the upper-left corner, add a boxed archive label reading exactly “NEW YORK CITY” with the subtitle “NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE” and a small archive code line “NYC-NAM-2024-001.” Add tiny header text along the top edge such as “LANDSCAPE ARCHIVE MODEL / 地景档案模型,” column letters across the top, and a small study label at the upper-right reading “EAST RIVER CORRIDOR STUDY” and “EDITION 01.”

Callouts and labels: Include exactly 11 named map labels/callout boxes: 1) “NEW JERSEY / HUDSON COUNTY,” 2) “HUDSON RIVER,” 3) “ONE WORLD TRADE CENTER / 1,776 ft / 541 m,” 4) “TIMES SQUARE / THEATER DISTRICT,” 5) “EMPIRE STATE BUILDING / 1,454 ft / 443 m,” 6) “CENTRAL PARK,” 7) “CHRYSLER BUILDING / 1,046 ft / 319 m,” 8) “EAST RIVER,” 9) “BROOKLYN BRIDGE / 1,595 ft / 486 m,” 10) “QUEENS / LONG ISLAND CITY,” 11) “BROOKLYN / DOWNTOWN BROOKLYN.” Use thin leader lines connecting callout boxes to landmarks.

Bottom information panels: Add exactly 4 technical panels along the bottom edge: 1) a legend panel with 6 symbol entries labeled “PRIMARY ROAD,” “SECONDARY ROAD,” “RAIL LINE,” “WATER BODY,” “PARK / GREEN SPACE,” and “MAJOR LANDMARK / BUILDING FOOTPRINT”; 2) a north arrow panel showing true north and grid north; 3) a scale panel labeled “SCALE 1:25,000” with imperial and metric scale bars; 4) an archive notes panel with small text including “ARCHIVE NOTES,” “This model represents a nocturnal capture of New York City urban form, infrastructure, and landmark illumination,” plus boxes for “ARCHIVE CODE NYC-NAM-2024-001,” “MODEL NO. 001,” and “SHEET NO. 01 / 01.”

Visual style: Ultra-detailed photorealistic miniature model mixed with technical blueprint/map design, crisp micro typography, precise gold linework, physical paper texture, slight bevels and shadows, moody night lighting, realistic reflections on rivers, and warm amber building illumination. The city should feel like a carefully directed miniature urban world, not a flat map.

Constraints: Keep all text in English except the tiny bilingual archive header already specified. Do not add people, vehicles as focal subjects, logos, or watermarks. Maintain consistent architectural-diorama language across the entire image. Use {argument name="lighting mood" default="dark nocturnal amber city lights"} and an archival cartography aesthetic with {argument name="map base color" default="deep navy blue"} background and {argument name="linework color" default="aged brass gold"} annotations.

The city should feel like a carefully directed miniature urban world, not a flat map.

Constraints: Keep all text in English except the tiny bilingual archive header already specified. Do not add people, vehicles as focal subjects, logos, or watermarks. name: miluo | 原生态食品包装设计
prompt: 整体是清新插画风格，左上是挂满橙红芒果的枝条，芒果色泽饱满；右下区域是铺着果干的竹制晾晒架，架后是青绿山丘与白墙红顶小屋。主体包装居中，为牛皮纸质感材质，顶部以麻绳系成提手。包装正面边缘环绕着芒果、草莓、青柠等果干切片装饰，装饰框内上方是醒目红色字体的 “阳光果干”，下方是 “自然晾晒”，再往下是盛着芒果、草莓的竹篮插画。包装右侧竖排列出 “芒果干”“草莓干”，旁附对应果干小图标，下方标注净含量，文字均为印刷体，排版紧凑有序。

name: 专业品牌包装系统
prompt:
请为品牌【{argument name="品牌名称" default="品牌名称"}】、类目为【{argument name="品牌类目" default="品牌类目"}】创作一张高审美、高完成度的「品牌包装系统展示图」。这不是普通电商白底图，也不是单一产品图，而是一张具有品牌提案感、视觉识别系统感和商业摄影质感的包装家族陈列效果图。画面需要体现“同一品牌在多个包装载体上的统一落地”，呈现一个成熟消费品牌的完整包装系统。

【画幅要求】整体必须为固定 4:5 的竖版海报构图，画面方向明确为纵向，禁止生成横版构图、宽幅桌面陈列或过于分散的横向展示。整体构图需符合海报阅读逻辑：上方保留呼吸感，中部为品牌包装系统的主要视觉焦点，下方安排辅助包装、标签和产品本体，整体重心集中，适合直接作为品牌展示海报发布。

【核心要求】根据【类目】自动匹配最合理、最自然的包装组合与产品形态，并围绕【品牌名字】建立统一的品牌视觉系统。画面中应选择少量但有代表性的包装形式，组成一组完整而精炼的品牌包装系统，不追求堆砌数量，而强调主次层级、品牌统一性与陈列美感。可根据类目合理选择以下包装类型中的一部分：手提袋 / 购物袋、纸盒 / 礼盒 / 外包装盒、长条盒 / 单品盒 / 套装盒、包装袋 / 封套 / 小样袋 / 软袋、杯子 / 瓶子 / 罐子 / 管状容器 / 喷雾瓶 / 泵头瓶、标签 / 贴纸 / 封签 / 吊牌 / 小卡片，以及与类目对应的真实产品本体。

【类目适配逻辑】包装形式与产品形态需要根据【类目】自动匹配，但不局限于单一方向。可参考以下适配逻辑自由发散：若类目为食品 / 烘焙 / 零食 / 饮品，则以纸袋、纸盒、包装袋、杯子、食品容器、贴纸、封签及真实产品本体为主；若类目为茶饮 / 咖啡 / 饮料，则以杯子、瓶子、罐装包装、提袋、杯套、封口贴、礼盒等为主；若类目为美妆 / 护肤 / 彩妆 / 香水，则以瓶、罐、管、盒、礼盒、手提袋、小样包装等为主；若类目为香氛 / 家居 / 生活方式，则以香薰瓶、蜡烛杯、包装盒、礼盒、提袋、吊卡、标签卡等为主；若类目为服饰 / 饰品 / 潮玩 / 文创，则以包装盒、抽屉盒、防尘袋、手提袋、贴纸、吊牌、配件包装等为主；若类目为数码配件 / 工具 / 小型消费品，则以硬盒、外包装盒、收纳袋、说明卡、贴纸、封套、标签等为主。整体必须体现“类目合理、品牌统一、包装成体系”的效果。

【数量与密度控制】请控制画面中的物件数量，不要过多堆砌，也不要把所有可能包装形式全部展示出来。整体应呈现“少而精、完整但不拥挤”的品牌包装系统效果。建议选择最具代表性的包装载体进行展示：大件包装 1～2 个，中型包装 2～3 个，小型包装或辅助物件 2～4 个，真实产品本体 1～3 个，总可见元素建议控制在 6～10 个之间。包装种类应体现层次变化与系统感，但不宜重复过多同类物件。画面需要有足够留白与呼吸感，确保每个包装都清晰可见、主次明确、摆放舒展，宁可少而精，也不要为了“完整”而过度塞满。

【品牌视觉系统要求】所有包装必须属于同一个品牌系统，统一使用【品牌名字】作为核心品牌识别元素。整体应具备一致的 logo / 标志呈现、字体风格、图形语言、插画语言或纹样系统、排版逻辑、配色体系、材质与印刷质感。品牌调性、色彩方向、图案元素、辅助图形和视觉氛围，请根据【类目】自动匹配并合理发散，不局限于任何固定风格。整体风格应统一、协调、具有品牌识别度，可以是简约高级、自然有机、时尚现代、轻奢精致、年轻清新、艺术感、潮流个性或经典优雅，但必须符合【类目】特征，并呈现成熟品牌的设计完成度。

【配色机制要求】整体配色不要固化为某一种固定组合，也不要连续多次出现高度相似的主色系统。每次生成时应根据【类目】与品牌气质，主动形成不同的主色方案与配色关系，采用“受控发散”的方式进行色彩演绎。色彩可以是低饱和自然色、现代中性色、轻复古色、明快清新色、轻奢深色系或艺术感综合色系，但必须保持高级、统一、克制、有品牌感。允许每次生成时呈现不同的视觉气质，例如奶油白与焦糖棕、雾灰蓝与暖白、橄榄绿与亚麻米、酒红与奶霜白、可可棕与象牙白、炭灰与麦秆金、雾粉灰与米白、海军蓝与暖灰等，仅作为参考方向而非固定模板。不要荧光色，不要廉价高饱和，不要杂乱失控的多色拼贴。

【画面构图与陈列要求】画面采用品牌包装家族陈列逻辑，而不是杂乱堆放。整体为商业摄影棚场景，使用 3/4 轻俯视角或略带透视的正面陈列角度，形成有层次、有秩序、有主次的包装展示画面。构图参考以下逻辑：后景摆放 1～2 个较大的包装作为视觉支撑，如手提袋、大礼盒、大外盒；中景安排品牌核心包装或主力单品包装，作为主要视觉焦点；前景摆放较小包装、辅助包装、标签、贴纸及真实产品本体；至少有一个真实产品与包装产生自然互动，如产品半露出、摆放在包装前方、与包装组合展示；整体形成平衡而有设计感的三角式或错落式构图。画面干净、有留白、不拥挤，内容丰富但克制，以有限而精准的包装组合体现完整的品牌包装生态。

【视觉风格要求】整体呈现高端商业摄影质感与品牌提案感，背景为干净的摄影棚环境，可为白色、暖白色、浅灰色，或根据品牌调性自动匹配的极简背景。画面应强调真实的包装材质表现、清晰的纸张折痕、盒型结构、瓶罐轮廓、标签细节、印刷质感、压纹 / 烫金 / 哑光 / 棉纸纹理 / 牛皮纸纹理等材质细节，以及统一而高级的配色搭配、精致现代干净的品牌视觉语言和强烈的“这是一整套品牌包装系统”的完整感。

【光影要求】采用真实商业摄影级光影，可为柔和棚拍光，也可带有轻微方向性的自然侧光。需要有清晰但克制的阴影，以增强立体感、空间感与高级感。整体光线通透、明亮、干净，不要阴暗，不要廉价感，不要杂乱背景。

【最终效果要求】最终画面应像一个成熟品牌的包装系统展示海报、包装家族提案图或品牌视觉落地效果图，而不是零散商品拼图。重点突出：固定 4:5 竖版海报感、品牌统一性、包装家族完整性、商业摄影感、设计提案感、类目适配性，以及高级审美与视觉完成度。

The overall style of the image is sketchy and artistic, with detailed line work and shading.

name: 宠物服装替换效果图
prompt: Create a clean e-commerce mockup on a very light gray background with a simple two-image comparison layout. In the upper right, place 1 small rounded-corner reference photo showing a white fluffy dog from behind, standing on soft light blue fabric and wearing a cream knit pet sweater with pale blue trim. The sweater features a large cartoon dog face patch in brown, black, and white, a red cursive word "Smile," a small red cherry, a blue star, and a yellow crescent moon. Beneath that small reference image, place 1 rounded light-gray text bubble containing Japanese instruction text in black sans-serif: 「画像内のペットを猫に差し替え、元の画像と同じ衣装を着せた状態にする。猫は正面または側面が見える向きで、全身がはっきり見えるようにする。」 In the lower left, place 1 larger rounded-corner final image with a subtle dark border, showing a full-body gray tabby and white cat standing on the same soft light blue fabric backdrop. The cat is facing slightly left but looking directly at the camera, with upright ears, large round eyes, white chest and legs, gray striped back and tail, and a calm alert expression. name: 纽约夜景 3D 档案地图
prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic 3D miniature architectural map of {argument name="city name" default="New York City"}, presented as a nocturnal urban archive board with raised buildings, glowing streets, waterways, landmark callouts, and technical cartographic annotations.

Canvas: Landscape 16:9 image, viewed from an elevated oblique angle as if looking down at a physical diorama map on a dark tabletop. Use a deep navy, charcoal, warm brass, and amber-light palette. The board has a thick dark frame, thin gold border lines, grid coordinates along the top/bottom and left/right edges, and a premium museum-archive feel.

Main subject: A highly detailed raised-relief 3D map of Manhattan and surrounding boroughs at night. Manhattan is centered and built as a dense miniature city with hundreds of extruded buildings, warm window lights, streetlight networks, bridges, docks, and dark reflective water. The tallest illuminated focal tower is the {argument name="central landmark" default="Empire State Building"} near the center, with a bright warm glow around Midtown. The southern tip includes a tall One World Trade Center tower. A long dark rectangle labeled Central Park sits in upper Manhattan. Surrounding flat map areas show New Jersey to the left, Queens to the right, and Brooklyn at lower right, with street grids drawn as thin golden lines.

Top title block: In the upper-left corner, add a boxed archive label reading exactly “NEW YORK CITY” with the subtitle “NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE” and a small archive code line “NYC-NAM-2024-001.” Add tiny header text along the top edge such as “LANDSCAPE ARCHIVE MODEL / 地景档案模型,” column letters across the top, and a small study label at the upper-right reading “EAST RIVER CORRIDOR STUDY” and “EDITION 01.”

Callouts and labels: Include exactly 11 named map labels/callout boxes: 1) “NEW JERSEY / HUDSON COUNTY,” 2) “HUDSON RIVER,” 3) “ONE WORLD TRADE CENTER / 1,776 ft / 541 m,” 4) “TIMES SQUARE / THEATER DISTRICT,” 5) “EMPIRE STATE BUILDING / 1,454 ft / 443 m,” 6) “CENTRAL PARK,” 7) “CHRYSLER BUILDING / 1,046 ft / 319 m,” 8) “EAST RIVER,” 9) “BROOKLYN BRIDGE / 1,595 ft / 486 m,” 10) “QUEENS / LONG ISLAND CITY,” 11) “BROOKLYN / DOWNTOWN BROOKLYN.” Use thin leader lines connecting callout boxes to landmarks.

Bottom information panels: Add exactly 4 technical panels along the bottom edge: 1) a legend panel with 6 symbol entries labeled “PRIMARY ROAD,” “SECONDARY ROAD,” “RAIL LINE,” “WATER BODY,” “PARK / GREEN SPACE,” and “MAJOR LANDMARK / BUILDING FOOTPRINT”; 2) a north arrow panel showing true north and grid north; 3) a scale panel labeled “SCALE 1:25,000” with imperial and metric scale bars; 4) an archive notes panel with small text including “ARCHIVE NOTES,” “This model represents a nocturnal capture of New York City urban form, infrastructure, and landmark illumination,” plus boxes for “ARCHIVE CODE NYC-NAM-2024-001,” “MODEL NO. 001,” and “SHEET NO. 01 / 01.”

Visual style: Ultra-detailed photorealistic miniature model mixed with technical blueprint/map design, crisp micro typography, precise gold linework, physical paper texture, slight bevels and shadows, moody night lighting, realistic reflections on rivers, and warm amber building illumination. The city should feel like a carefully directed miniature urban world, not a flat map.

Constraints: Keep all text in English except the tiny bilingual archive header already specified. Do not add people, vehicles as focal subjects, logos, or watermarks. Maintain consistent architectural-diorama language across the entire image. Use {argument name="lighting mood" default="dark nocturnal amber city lights"} and an archival cartography aesthetic with {argument name="map base color" default="deep navy blue"} background and {argument name="linework color" default="aged brass gold"} annotations.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed photorealistic miniature model mixed with technical blueprint/map design, crisp micro typography, precise gold linework, physical paper texture, slight bevels and shadows, moody night lighting, realistic reflections on rivers, and warm amber building illumination. The city should feel like a carefully directed miniature urban world, not a flat map.

Constraints: Keep all text in English except the tiny bilingual archive header already specified. Do not add people, vehicles as focal subjects, logos, or watermarks. Maintain consistent architectural-diorama language across the entire image. Use {argument name="lighting mood" default="dark nocturnal amber city lights"} and an archival cartography aesthetic with {argument name="map base color" default="deep navy blue"} background and {argument name="linework color" default="aged brass gold"} annotations.

name: 扑克牌
prompt: [图中角色，上半身像，侧身视角，身体前倾，一手拿着柯尔特，一手拿着装着冰球的波尔本酒杯] 的绝对对称、上下颠倒镜像扑克牌设计。画面呈现出 20 世纪中期（1930s-1950s）黑色电影与经典漫画插画的复古美学，采用手工绘制的墨水、水彩和色铅笔混合媒介，在具有明显古董纸张纤维质感的艺术纸上呈现。画面由一个精致的装饰性边框环绕，角落有古董风格的文字（例如，“J”）。色调是有限而和谐的复古色调，包括深红、米白、棕色、藏青和古董金。主体人物/物体的镜像上下交织在一起，并被大量符号化、复杂的道具和线条（例如，萤火虫、幻想、弹壳、西部牛仔标志）所连接和环绕，形成一个复杂的图案。画面具有高信息密度，但构图清晰。散发着严肃、神秘、经典和精致的氛围。光线柔和、均匀，捕捉到所有笔触和纹理细节，类似于高质量的艺术品扫描件。

name: Saka 巴塞罗那转会官宣海报设计提示词
prompt: 创作一张极具戏剧性的足球转会官宣海报，主题为 {argument name="player name" default="Bukayo Saka"} 加入 {argument name="club name" default="FC Barcelona"}。采用 4:5 比例的竖版体育海报构图，运用深电光蓝与深红色的色调，强调高对比度光影、电影级阴影、微弱光晕以及高级社交媒体平面设计风格。画面中心放置一张球员胸部以上的正面肖像，身穿 {argument name="jersey description" default="2024/25 赛季 FC Barcelona 主场球衣（含 Spotify 赞助商标志）"}，表情严肃自信。在其身后右侧，放置一张该球员更大尺寸、低透明度的侧面肖像作为背景层，并叠加深蓝色调。在背景中部添加一个巨大的、若隐若现的 FC Barcelona 队徽，并与红蓝渐变背景融合。在顶部正中央放置 2 个俱乐部标识：FC Barcelona 队徽，其上方为一个小的垂直红蓝条纹图案。在左上方，以金色小号大写字母添加文字"MÉS QUE UN CLUB"。在左侧中下方，创建两行醒目的排版文字：上方为金色小号大写字母"BUKAYO"，下方为超大号白色紧凑型无衬线字体"SAKA"。在其下方，添加两行大写欢迎词：白色"BENVINGUT"和红色"AL BARÇA"。添加一个金色手写风格签名"B. Saka"，下方标注数字"7"。在前景靠近底部中央的位置，放置该球员全身奔跑庆祝的动作姿态，双臂张开，身穿同样的 Barcelona 球衣、深蓝色球袜、浅色球鞋及白色护腕。在底部，展示一张风格化的 Spotify Camp Nou 体育场发光全景图，横跨海报底部，呈现深蓝色调并带有红色高光，可见微小的"SPOTIFY CAMP NOU"体育场文字。在左下角，包含两行小字："FC BARCELONA"（金色）和"2024/25"（红色）。在右肩区域添加一个金色袖口细节。保持布局整洁、层次分明、现代且富有感染力，呈现出顶级俱乐部转会官宣图的质感。运用锐利的照片合成技术、逼真的织物纹理、光泽高光以及精致的海报后期处理。

name: 美团新年春节年货节海报
prompt: 3d电影质感画面,C4D风格,超大广角,超大透视,仰视角度,夸张视觉表现,广角镜头,这是美团外卖打造的新年活动场景，采用巨型灯笼与新春好物交融的雅致国风风格呈现，满是传统非遗韵味与新年喜庆氛围，极具消费吸引力。 画面核心是一座巨型灯笼艺术装置，融合传统宫灯结构，灯笼框架是烫金雕花实木，勾勒出祥云龙纹轮廓。灯笼表面是镂空的 “福”“春”“喜” 吉祥字样，栩栩如生的花鸟鱼虫纹样，投射出流动的光影图案，灯笼底部悬挂着彩色流苏与小巧的挂件，风一吹便轻轻摇曳，尽显灵动雅致。 灯笼内部是通透的环形展示空间，分层陈列着产品礼盒、套装。 美团外卖的黄色袋鼠IP吉祥物在灯笼旁活力互动，它身红色喜庆的服装，黄色围巾，一手提着迷你灯笼，踮着脚尖仰头打量巨型灯笼，脸上带着好奇又欢喜的笑容。 背景是渐变的暖橙与朱红的渐变天空，漂浮着细碎的金箔与祥云，下方是古色古香的青瓦白墙街巷轮廓，屋檐下挂满小型灯笼与中国结，偶尔有飘落的红色纸碎片，将传统非遗工坊氛围与现代消费场景巧妙融合。 文案上，通过巨型灯笼的视觉冲击、非遗年货的丰富陈列与美团 IP 的趣味互动，打造出兼具传统韵味与便捷消费体验的促销画面。

prompt: 3D realistic texture,3D realistic texture,The scene is located in a bustling vegetable market, with stalls filled with various fresh vegetables, lively fruits, and lively fish and shrimp. The ground is somewhat damp, scattered with some rotten vegetable leaves and water stains. People shuttle between the stalls, and the sounds of bargaining and shouting come and go, filled with a strong atmosphere of life. In this noisy and down-to-earth realistic scene, there is a 3D animated character that stands out particularly. That is a vegetable vendor wearing a blue apron, with some dirt on the apron, but unable to conceal the passionate smile on his face, forming a sharp contrast with the slightly messy environment around him. He is skillfully selecting vegetables for customers, with agile hand movements, delivering fresh and tender vegetables to them one by one, and not forgetting to introduce the freshness and cooking methods of the dishes. His eyes are sincere and simple, showing the diligent and down-to-earth spirit of vegetable vendors who manage their business with care and provide high-quality ingredients for everyone during Labor Day, as if every transaction is a transmission of his love for life.

name: 雨中北京地铁通勤
prompt: Create a cinematic vertical street-photography scene in {argument name="city" default="Beijing"} at dusk after rain, showing a lone commuter walking away from the camera on a glossy wet sidewalk toward a brightly lit subway entrance on the right. The subway entrance has a modern gray rectangular canopy, glass walls, stairs and escalators descending inside, cool fluorescent interior lighting, tactile yellow paving strips, and a circular blue-and-white metro logo above the doorway. On the left, a congested multi-lane road is packed with cars and taxis, their red brake lights reflecting across puddles and black asphalt. In the distance, show a dense skyline with recognizable modern high-rises, including the CCTV Headquarters-shaped building, under a dramatic cloudy sunset sky with peach, purple, and blue tones. Add a stylized glowing red navigation route overlay rising above the traffic: one continuous spiral path made of thin red lines, small connected nodes, and a large red map pin near the upper left skyline, symbolizing route uncertainty and traffic delay. The pedestrian is a young adult man seen from behind, average build, wearing {argument name="commuter outfit" default="a light beige jacket, dark trousers, white sneakers, and a black shoulder bag"}, walking with a calm but slightly weary posture. Use realistic proportions, moody urban atmosphere, high detail, wet reflections, shallow cinematic contrast, soft haze, and a documentary photo look. No visible captions, no watermark, no extra text.
promptEn: Create a cinematic vertical street-photography scene in {argument name="city" default="Beijing"} at dusk after rain, showing a lone commuter walking away from the camera on a glossy wet sidewalk toward a brightly lit subway entrance on the right. The subway entrance has a modern gray rectangular canopy, glass walls, stairs and escalators descending inside, cool fluorescent interior lighting, tactile yellow paving strips, and a circular blue-and-white metro logo above the doorway. On the left, a congested multi-lane road is packed with cars and taxis, their red brake lights reflecting across puddles and black asphalt. In the distance, show a dense skyline with recognizable modern high-rises, including the CCTV Headquarters-shaped building, under a dramatic cloudy sunset sky with peach, purple, and blue tones. Add a stylized glowing red navigation route overlay rising above the traffic: one continuous spiral path made of thin red lines, small connected nodes, and a large red map pin near the upper left skyline, symbolizing route uncertainty and traffic delay. The pedestrian is a young adult man seen from behind, average build, wearing {argument name="commuter outfit" default="a light beige jacket, dark trousers, white sneakers, and a black shoulder bag"}, walking with a calm but slightly weary posture. Use realistic proportions, moody urban atmosphere, high detail, wet reflections, shallow cinematic contrast, soft haze, and a documentary photo look. No visible captions, no watermark, no extra text.

prompt: このキャラクターを使って、{argument name="イベント" default="コミックマーケットの同人サークル参加"}をテーマにした、ストーリー性のあるイラストを作成する。参照画像はキャラクター参照としてのみ使用し、元画像の構図・背景・ポーズ・フレーミングは流用しないこと。キャラクターは自分のサークルスペースで売り子をしている。机の上には、キャラクターに合ったオリジナル同人誌、ポスター、アクリルグッズ、缶バッジ、ペーパー、値札、お品書きなどが並んでいる。頒布物の内容や世界観は、キャラクター性からAI自身が自然に発想すること。実在しそうな同人サークルの空気感を重視する。キャラクターは、{argument name="衣装" default="新刊作品をモチーフにしたコスプレ衣装風のアレンジ衣装"}を着ている。「自分の本のキャラクターになって売り子している」ような空気感にする。サークルスペースには、段ボール、ガムテープ、飲みかけのペットボトル、荷物、椅子、小物などを適度に配置し、イベント会場らしい生活感を出す。シチュエーションや空気感は毎回ランダム性を持たせること。大盛況、微妙に暇、開場直後、閉会間際、疲労、達成感、虚無感、カオス、静かな時間、予想外の人気、誰も来ない時間帯など、毎回異なるイベント空気を自然に表現する。キャラクターには吹き出しを追加し、その状況に合った短いコメントを喋らせること。吹き出しのセリフは、オタクっぽいリアルなテンション、少しだけシュールな空気、イベント参加者らしい生活感を重視する。セリフは短めで、思わずクスっとする自然な内容にする。過剰なエフェクト、ギラついたライティング、不自然な映え演出は避ける。「本当にどこかに存在しそうな同人サークル」を感じる、リアル寄りの空気感を重視する。

name: Mrs Mermaid 杂志拼贴画
prompt:
Goal: Create a polished two-page magazine-style photo collage advertisement about an adult woman preparing for and entering a swimming pool, with a sentimental Japanese beauty-pageant / swimming-school mood.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 spread, approximately 1200×675 px, split vertically into two pages with a thin white gutter in the center. Use clean white borders between all photo panels, soft warm lighting on the left page, cool blue pool lighting on the right page.

Layout: Use exactly 9 discrete photo panels total. Left page has 4 panels: 1 large vertical portrait occupying the left two-thirds, showing a woman from chest up in a mustard-yellow textured long-sleeve dress, long wavy brown hair, dangling yellow earrings, elegant studio-like lighting; 3 smaller stacked panels on the right, with the top panel showing 2 women close together in profile, the middle panel showing hair being tied into a high ponytail, and the bottom panel showing the back of the head while a stylist secures the ponytail. Right page has 5 panels: 1 large upper-left panel showing the same woman standing poolside in a wet mustard-yellow dress, black wet ponytail, one hand near her face and one hand on her waist; 2 smaller stacked panels on the far right showing her swimming from behind and then front-facing in blue water; 1 lower-left panel showing her leaning forward at the pool edge with wet hair and dress; 1 lower-right panel showing a cropped close portrait in the pool with a side ponytail and sparkling water.

Subject details: The woman should appear like a poised Japanese adult contestant or model, wearing the same mustard-yellow patterned dress throughout. Her hair transforms from dry, loose, long brown waves on the left page to sleek wet black ponytail in the pool scenes. Add large soft rectangular beige privacy blocks over every visible face, matching the generated image censor style, with no facial features visible.

Text content: Add large handwritten Japanese headline at top left: {argument name="headline text" default="ミセスマーメイド"}. Add a small handwritten Japanese sentence under the headline: {argument name="tagline text" default="いつもの私を、少し強く見せてくれる水の中。"} with a small heart at the end. Add vertical Japanese copy along the far left margin: {argument name="left vertical copy" default="試合前、わくわくと緊張の時間"}. Add vertical Japanese copy on the right page near the standing poolside image: {argument name="right vertical copy" default="ソロ部門、初めての舞台へ。"}. Add a small handwritten note along the bottom right over the pool image: {argument name="bottom handwritten note" default="泳ぎ終えたら、またひとつ、私の好きになる。"}, plus faint white logo-like text near the bottom right resembling “MINIMAX” and “Hailuo AI”.

Visual style: Photorealistic lifestyle photography, glossy Japanese magazine spread, elegant feminine editorial design, white collage borders, warm cream background on the left, saturated aqua-blue pool water on the right, shallow depth of field, realistic wet fabric and water droplets, soft highlights and reflections.

Constraints: Use exactly 9 photo panels and exactly 2 visible women only in the top small left-page panel; all other panels feature the same single woman. Keep the faces covered by beige rectangular censor blocks. Do not add extra panels, extra people, or readable text beyond the specified Japanese copy and faint logo-like marks.

name: 1970 年代复古日本软胶玩具
prompt: アップロードされたロボット画像を完全な参照元として使用する。頭部形状、発光する大きな複眼、濃紺と金色の配色、レトロフューチャーなデザインを維持したまま、1970年代の日本製ソフビ玩具としてデフォルメする。テーマは「{argument name="年代" default="1978"}年に発売され、子供に何十年も遊び倒された中古ソフビ」。画面左側にはオリジナルの箱。強い日焼けで色が抜け、角は潰れ、破れをセロハンテープで補修している。印刷は擦れて消えかけており、値札シールや子供が貼ったシール跡が残っている。湿気による変形や汚れもある。昭和の玩具店の売れ残りではなく、実際に何十年も家庭で保管されてきた雰囲気。画面右側にはロボットのソフビ人形。頭部や肩は何度も床に落とされたため細かな打痕だらけ。鼻先や角の塗装は剥がれ、下地のソフビ成形色が露出している。複眼パーツには細かな擦り傷。腕や脚には遊んだ跡の無数の傷。足裏は摩耗して角が丸くなっている。濃紺のソフビは長年の日光で部分的に退色。金色塗装は半分以上剥がれ、塗膜がひび割れている。関節周辺には黒ずみや埃の蓄積。全体に経年変化によるツヤの低下。新品の光沢感はない。子供が油性ペンで名前を書いた跡をうっすら残す。落書きを消そうとした擦れ跡。接着剤で修理された小さな亀裂。昭和の子供が本気で遊んだリアルな生活感。木製の学習机の上。机には細かな傷や鉛筆跡。背景には昭和の子供部屋を思わせるボケた風景。暖色の白熱電球照明。夕方の雰囲気。玩具コレクターが発見した実在の中古ソフビを撮影したようなフォトリアルな商品写真。フィルム写真風の粒状感。微細な埃。高精細。ヴィンテージ玩具専門誌の特集ページ品質。 extremely worn vintage sofubi, heavily played with by children, chipped paint, scratches, dents, faded colors, repaired cracks, dust accumulation, realistic aging, authentic Japanese vintage toy photography, photorealistic, collectible toy documentation no mint condition, no factory new appearance, no modern collectible figure, no premium statue, no pristine surface, no clean packaging, no modern toy store display

name: 胜者和败者
prompt:
# Role: 创意UI设计师 / 角色魔改大师 # Task: 我正在测试大模型的知识库和生图能力，根据参考图，生成一张动漫风格的插图。
图1为女主，图2为女配。

画面中心是图1角色。她双手紧紧握着一把灰色金属棍的杆部，将其横跨在背后，身体微微前倾。她嘴角勾起一抹冷酷而自信的微笑，眼神锐利地向下俯视着脚下。画面的最下方，是倒在血泊中的图2角色，只能看到一头凌乱的黑发和部分带有伤痕的衣着，鲜血和破碎的物体散落在地上，强烈的透视效果让这具躯体显得离镜头极近。视线越过少女，背景是一片混沌的深红色异空间或是燃烧的战场废墟，模糊的巨大红色块面和四处飘散的金色火星与黑色灰烬交织在一起，充满了肃杀之气。采用极端的低角度仰拍视角，凸显图1角色的威压感。画面运用中心构图结合强烈的景深层次，将前景的模糊躯体与清晰的主体分离开来。戏剧性的强光从背景左上方倾泻而下，为少女镀上耀眼的金色轮廓光。空气中弥漫着火花，营造出史诗且极具压迫感的战斗余波氛围。

slug: gta6-迈阿密风海滩俱乐部游戏截图生成器-1_074606
name: GTA6 迈阿密风海滩俱乐部游戏截图生成器
prompt: 创作一张超逼真的开放世界犯罪类电子游戏截图，风格参考现代迈阿密风格的海滩俱乐部任务场景，画面呈现于明亮的午后阳光下，天空湛蓝。采用类似第三人称游戏视角的构图，前景中坐着一位留着深色短发、肤色白皙的年轻男子，身穿纯黑色 T 恤和印花泳裤，他随意地坐在浅色沙滩上，身体微微侧向一旁，仿佛玩家视角在他身旁停下。将他置于画面左侧偏中心位置，占据较大比例，姿态自然放松。在他身后，描绘一个高档海滩俱乐部，沙滩上清晰可见 3 个带有飘逸窗帘的白色凉亭，种植着多棵高大的棕榈树，左侧是绿松石色的海水，右侧是一排具有装饰艺术风格的酒店，外墙呈柔和色调并带有霓虹装饰。海滩上布满了 12 位身着泳装的背景人群：有人站着聊天，有人在岸边行走，另有 2 人坐在右侧的餐桌旁享用餐饮。画面包含白色休闲家具、遮阳伞，营造出精致的社交派对氛围。添加逼真的游戏 HUD 界面：左下角是一个标有 GPS 路线的方形小地图，右下角显示武器和控制图标，右上角显示金额为 $45,670 的金钱计数器。整体观感应类似于次世代《Grand Theft Auto VI》的游戏截图，具有电影感且呈现出明显的游戏内质感，细节丰富、阴影真实、色彩分级充满活力的海岸气息，并带有罪恶都市中那种微妙的奢华海滩讽刺感。

prompt: 图片1 平面布置图 为唯一几何与工程依据，严格保持原始比例、实际尺寸、墙体厚度、门窗位置与空间结构关系，禁止任何格局改动。 後面圖片為 風格參考 整体设计风格为現代风格， 以现代手法重构，比例克制、线条理性、高级配色，具商业展示质感。所有现场比例、尺度逻辑以平面图为准。输出一份 效果图+施工图+系统图 施工图纸,多图拼接海报式排版 输出图 5–7： 图5｜软装示意图：家具、灯具、地毯、饰面材质独立排布，编号对应； 图6｜地面铺装图：材质肌理、拼接方向、收边逻辑清楚； 图7｜天花造型图：层级关系、跌级尺寸明确，灯具布置含基础照明、重点照明、氛围光； 2K 分辨率，多图拼接海报式排版，白色或浅灰底，CAD 工程制图逻辑结合高质量空间效果表现，线条干净、层级清楚、比例准确，中文标注完整但不过度干扰画面。 白色或浅灰底，线条干净、层级清楚、比例准确，中文标注清晰但不过度干扰画面。 多图拼接海报式排版，统一CAD图框与版面系统， 线型分层清楚（墙体、家具、设备、标注），材质采低饱和高质感配色。字体系统：标题黑体、正文中黑、数据等宽字体，8级字号层级。 右上角标示「KsirLin3D空间规划」，右下角手写签名「设计总监K」， 整体呈现为提案与竞图用高质感室内设计效果展板。3:2 横向 共3張效果圖

制服の基本デザインは統一すること。

制服の種類を変更してはいけない。

制服デザインそのものを変更してはいけない。

変更してよい要素は以下のみ。

・リボン

・ネクタイ

・バッグ

・靴

・靴下

・腕時計

・アクセサリー

・髪飾り

・カーディガン

・ベスト

・袖まくり

・制服の着崩し方

同じ制服でありながら個性を表現すること。

異性の場合は、

基準キャラクターの制服デザインを参考に、

同じ学校の異性用制服として自然にデザインすること。

【シルエット】

全員を明確に差別化すること。

一目見ただけで誰が誰か分かること。

【構図】

3:4縦長。

アニメキービジュアル。

ゲームイベントCG。

全員を同じ画面に表示すること。

全員の全身を表示すること。

全員の顔を見せること。

キャラクターを重ねないこと。

誰が誰か分かる配置にすること。

自然で見栄えの良いグループ構図にすること。

【関係性】

自然な距離感にすること。

恋人のようなポーズは禁止。

【背景】

{argument name="背景" default="教室。放課後。窓から夕日が差し込む。机と椅子。黒板。"}

アニメのワンシーンのような空気感。

キャラクターが主役であること。

背景は補助要素とすること。

高品質な線画。

自然な表情。

自然なポージング。

美しいライティング。

name: 12 格长矛 Sakuga 分镜脚本
prompt:
Goal: Create a monochrome anime action storyboard sheet for an animation fight sequence, full of rough sakuga energy: gestural, dynamic, and readable, like a choreography bible for animators. The subject is {argument name="character name" default="a long-haired robed spear warrior"} performing a spear-and-water combat ritual across exactly 12 panels.

Canvas: Wide horizontal storyboard board, 16:9 ratio, divided into an exact 3x4 grid with thick black panel borders. Each panel has a black number badge in the upper-left corner, numbered 01 through 12, with hand-lettered uppercase titles and small color-coded annotation notes.

Visual style: Grayscale ink-and-pencil concept art with loose sketch lines, dramatic motion blur, wind-torn cloth, flying hair, splashing water, ruined coastal towers, hanging lanterns, birds in the sky, and cinematic camera angles. Keep the art mostly black, white, and gray, but overlay clear colored animator annotations: red for camera movement, blue for body mechanics, green for weapon arc, orange for impact or lantern reaction, and purple for timing or hold beats. Annotation arrows should be hand-drawn, bright, and readable.

Layout and panel content: Include exactly 12 storyboard panels:

01 — SPEAR PLANT REVEAL: The warrior stands upright on flooded stone, spear planted vertically into the water. Distant towers and seabirds behind. Red arrows show a low front wide camera move, blue notes show still stance, green arrow shows spear vertical, purple rings at the feet show stillness.

02 — TIDE BREATH: Medium side shot. The warrior extends the spear horizontally while cloth and hair flow in the wind. Red note: medium side. Blue arrows: arms rise, inhale. Green arrow: spear lifts parallel. Purple timing mark: breath hold.

03 — FIRST SWEEP CUT: Dynamic tracking-wide shot of the warrior lunging into a wide sweeping spear cut, water exploding at the feet. Red annotation: tracking wide. Blue arrows: hip rotation, low sweep. Green arc sweeps left to right across the panel. Purple note: release.

04 — SPIRAL ENTRY: Overhead or high-angle spin view. The warrior rotates in a 360-degree spiral, robes forming circular motion. Red note: orbit follow. Blue: spin 360. Green: spear orbital loop. Purple: snap at top.

05 — SALTWATER STEP: Ground-tracking shot. The warrior steps forward through shallow seawater, spear trailing outward, ripples spreading. Red: ground tracking. Blue: cross step forward. Green: water ripples outward. Purple: weight shift.

06 — PILLAR VAULT: High-angle follow shot as the warrior vaults or leaps near a tall broken pillar. Red: high angle follow. Blue: upward vault, body extend. Green: spear trails below. Purple: airborne beat.

07 — DOWNWARD PLUNGE: Front low push-in. The warrior drives the spear downward into the ground or water, creating a violent burst. Red: front low push-in. Blue: two-hand strike descend. Green: spear vertical down. Orange: impact burst. Purple: hit snap.

08 — BLADE SPIN RECOVER: Wide side view recovery stance. The warrior pivots low while the spear loops tightly around the body. Red: wide side view. Blue: behind-back loop, recover stance. Green: tight spear loop. Purple: reset breath.

09 — LANTERN PASS: Rear three-quarter composition with the warrior passing under hanging lanterns, spear extended across the frame. Red: rear 3/4. Blue: tip graze precise line. Green: spear tip path. Orange: lanterns sway, chain reaction. Purple: soft snap.

10 — TIDE SILHOUETTE: Extreme low wide shot. The warrior poses dramatically on a broken stone platform against a towering wave. Red: extreme low wide. Blue: full body pose. Green: spear overhead arc. Purple: hero pause.

11 — ROBES-TO-WATER CUT: Tracking front shot. The warrior slashes downward through water, robes whipping into the motion. Red: tracking front. Blue: slide descend steps. Green: robes trail through water. Purple: controlled flow decay.

12 — RITE UNFINISHED: Wide hero shot at sunset or pale dawn. The warrior stands facing the horizon, spear leveled forward, ocean ruins and a glowing sun in the distance. Red: wide hero shot. Blue: stand and level forward. Green: spear leveled at horizon. Purple: forward intent.

Text content: Use hand-lettered English titles exactly as listed for all 12 panels. Add small colored notes inside each panel, matching the listed red, blue, green, orange, and purple annotations. Optional main design emphasis: {argument name="motion emphasis" default="water-spear choreography with readable animation planning arrows"}.

Constraints: Exactly 12 panels in a 3x4 grid, no extra panels. Preserve the locked annotation color key: red camera, blue body, green weapon arc, orange impact, purple timing. Keep the image mostly monochrome with only the annotation colors vivid. Avoid polished clean lineart; keep it rough, energetic, cinematic, and storyboard-like.

name: Liblib 建筑及室内设计 a39abe03
prompt: 一支蘸着黄浦江水与集成电路蚀刻液的纳米碳管笔,正从丝绢云纹纸左下角向右上勾勒出一道流光的琉璃色笔迹,笔迹中浮现出微缩的上海营造盛景——黄浦江如鎏金缎带贯穿万国建筑群,两岸石库门里弄,陆家嘴塔楼从Art Deco装饰的实景渐变为《点石斋画报》中的石印线描轮廓,画卷顶端以花体英文与楷书合璧书写“SHANGHAI”,远处佘山与东海大堤如自然与文明的潮汐线,工部局工匠铺设煤气管道,工程师吊装环球金融中心桁架的场景在滩涂与冲积平原间铺展,一座由外白渡桥钢铆结构与南浦大桥螺旋引桥复合的“时空叠合桥”横跨江心,江流最终汇入前景浩瀚的东海,海面沙船舰队与洋山港集装箱巨轮如历史图层的叠影,画面呈现月份牌广告画擦笔水彩与晶圆光刻的层叠质感,笔锋在轨迹末端如无线电塔天线微颤,笔迹外保留丝绢的罗纹肌理与摩斯电码穿孔痕,隐约浮现《江南全图》中的圩田水网与当代城市传感器网格叠加,向画外淡化为长江口晨雾的蟹壳青,背景为外滩花岗岩墙体的珍珠白,整体融合海派书画金石趣味与数字生成艺术,珐琅彩光泽,月份牌美人图的“甜白釉”肤色与浦东天际线LED冷光交织,超高清可见海关大钟齿轮咬合纹理与半导体硅片衍射光栅,笔迹之外都是留白,隐约浮现平面地图经纬线,像画面外渐隐淡化为全白色,背景为纯净的白色,整体风格融合了传统中国风与现代立体艺术,高细节,超写实,HDR,8K分辨率,

slug: 蓝色高定-梦幻皇家蓝团体肖像写真-2_7202f5
name: 蓝色高定：梦幻皇家蓝团体肖像写真
prompt: 一张奢华的摄影棚时尚肖像，画面中 {argument name="group size" default="四位"} 优雅的年轻女性在充满戏剧性的皇家蓝梦幻场景中紧密靠在一起。她们身着协调一致的深蓝宝石色和午夜海军蓝高定晚礼服，礼服上点缀着闪亮的珠饰、花卉贴花、亮片、蕾丝袖、透明网纱细节以及蓬松的层叠裙摆。场景呈现单色调的蓝色，带有冷峻、忧郁且高端的编辑风格调色。将女性安排在紧凑的三角形构图中：两位站立或位于后方高处，两位坐在前方铺有织物的地面上，姿态优雅各异：一人手臂举过头顶，一人微微倾斜，一人端坐，一人手托下巴。她们的礼服各具特色但风格统一，饰有华丽的水晶装饰、刺绣花朵和修身胸衣。搭配配套的蓝宝石首饰，包括吊坠耳环、宝石项链和花卉发饰。她们留着飘逸的长发，发色混合了深黑色和柔和的浅棕色，造型顺滑且充满魅力。周围环绕着华丽的布景：背景中有 2 个插满蓝玫瑰的古典瓮形花瓶、1 根凹槽石柱、厚重的闪光天鹅绒窗帘，以及周围堆叠的大量缎面织物。灯光柔和且漫射，在缎面和珠宝上形成微妙的高光，营造出一种高贵、神秘且浪漫的氛围。采用竖构图时尚编辑肖像拍摄，从腰部以上到全身坐姿构图，展现高度细腻的织物纹理，呈现精致的奢华美妆广告美学，画面中无可见文字。

name: Shion Rei 三面角色设计图
prompt:
Goal: Create an anime character three-view reference sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Shion Rei"}, styled like a clean Japanese design document for an original schoolgirl character.

Canvas: Horizontal 16:9 sheet on an off-white lightly textured paper background, thin black divider lines, neat hand-drawn anime concept art with soft watercolor shading and crisp ink outlines. Keep the overall page monochrome-muted with navy, cream, blush pink, and black accents.

Header text: At the top left, write “紫苑レイ (Shion Rei) 三面図設計図” with a smaller subtitle underneath, “詳細設計：ツインテール Ver.” Draw a long thin horizontal rule below the subtitle. Use Japanese labels above the character views and inset boxes.

Main layout: Show exactly 3 full-body character turnaround views across the left and center of the sheet, evenly spaced and standing upright: 1) front view labeled “紫苑レイ 正面図”, 2) side view labeled “紫苑レイ 側面図”, 3) back view labeled “紫苑レイ 背面図”. The front view faces forward with arms relaxed; the side view faces left and shows the backpack profile; the back view faces away and clearly shows the backpack and twin-tails.

Character details: The girl has long {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair in high twin-tails, slightly wavy at the ends, tied with small pale pink bead-like hair ornaments. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur/mosaic mask in every face-facing view. She wears a dark navy short-sleeve polka-dot dress with many white dots, a dusty pink rounded Peter Pan collar, dusty pink front placket with buttons, puff sleeves, a fitted waist, and a flared pleated skirt above the knees. She also wears dark knee-high socks and white Mary Jane shoes with black straps and low heels. Add a cream-colored rounded school backpack with front zipper pocket, side seams, shoulder straps, and simple line detailing.

Right-side detail panels: Create exactly 4 inset reference boxes arranged on the right side. Top large box labeled “髪型/襟元クローズアップ” showing a close-up bust view of the twin-tail hairstyle, pink hair ties, collar, and upper polka-dot dress, with the face blurred. Middle-left small box shows a close-up of the skirt hem and legs. Middle-right tall box shows a close-up of one lower leg with dark knee sock and white Mary Jane shoe. Bottom-left box shows the backpack alone as a clean accessory drawing, three-quarter view with zipper pocket and straps.

Constraints: Preserve the exact count of 3 main full-body views and 4 inset detail boxes. Keep the labels in Japanese as specified. Use no extra characters, no extra props beyond the backpack and outfit, no watermark, no photorealism, and maintain a polished anime character design sheet aesthetic.

name: Liblib 建筑及室内设计 f8783943
prompt: 这是一幅水彩风格的大场景插画，充满了二次元的漫画感。画面中，丰富的装饰品点缀其间，垂下来的树枝上随风飞舞，营造出飘零的氛围。色彩以绿色为主，高亮高饱和的绿色渐变色彩叙事让画面显得流光溢彩。画面运用独特的非传统构图艺术，结合斑驳梦幻的光影和动态模糊、虚焦的效果，呈现出一种独特的磨砂感，在虚实反复穿插中，展现出阳光治愈的氛围和自然静谧的气息，微光反射，营造出诗意。
promptEn: 这是一幅水彩风格的大场景插画，充满了二次元的漫画感。画面中，丰富的装饰品点缀其间，垂下来的树枝上随风飞舞，营造出飘零的氛围。色彩以绿色为主，高亮高饱和的绿色渐变色彩叙事让画面显得流光溢彩。画面运用独特的非传统构图艺术，结合斑驳梦幻的光影和动态模糊、虚焦的效果，呈现出一种独特的磨砂感，在虚实反复穿插中，展现出阳光治愈的氛围和自然静谧的气息，微光反射，营造出诗意。

slug: 日本生态社区品牌宣传海报设计提示词-6_baf0ad
name: 日本生态社区品牌宣传海报设计提示词
prompt: 一张精美的日本社区与可持续发展项目宣传海报，项目名称为 {argument name="project name" default="セカイムラ"}，设计风格如同高端生态生活方式宣传单。垂直布局，简洁优雅，采用柔和的米色纸张背景，营造出明亮且充满愿景的氛围。上半部分以构图中心的一个巨大半透明地球仪为主体，右上方散发出温暖的日出光芒。地球仪内部呈现出一幅令人惊叹的绿色山谷航拍景观，山谷通向宁静的蓝色海湾或湖泊，下方点缀着村庄和农田，极具电影感和乌托邦色彩。在地球仪上方，放置一行较小的日文标语 {argument name="tagline text" default="世界は1つの村になる。"}，下方是加粗的深海军蓝日文书法字体主标题：{argument name="main title text" default="セカイムラ"}。围绕地球仪，拼贴 8 张自然融入边缘的生活照：1) 左上，两人在树下户外交谈；2) 左中上，几人在稻田里共同劳作；3) 左中，夜晚在质朴木结构建筑内围坐；4) 左下，自然环境中的两人肖像；5) 右上，一群人在温暖的室内灯光下长桌聚餐；6) 右中，一人在照料植物或农作物；7) 右中下，夕阳下人们在山脊上牵手排成一列；8) 右下，一人正在进食或手持食物的特写肖像。摄影风格应体现人文感、社区感，略带理想化，具有柔和的景深、自然的肤色、黄金时刻的高光以及平滑的广告海报合成效果。下半部分在浅米色背景上包含 3 张间距均匀的功能卡片，由细微的垂直分隔线隔开。左侧卡片 1 标题为深蓝色的"セカイムラ 新月会"，配有夜间篝火圆圈照片及一段简短的日文描述文本。中间卡片 2 标题为暖金色的"セカイムラ 満月会"，配有灯串下室内晚间聚会的圆形照片，圆圈周围有装饰性的放射状太阳光线，下方附带简短的日文描述文本。右侧卡片 3 标题为绿色的"セカイムラ 米部が今の一押し"，标题旁有小型稻苗插画，配有一碗白米饭的圆形照片及一段简短的日文描述文本。在这些卡片下方，添加一行居中的深蓝色日文声明：{argument name="footer slogan" default="人・自然・文化がつながり、循環する未来を一緒につくる。"}。在此下方，横向排列 4 个小型图标及文字项，每个图标配有简单的细线条图标和两行日文标签：1) 人物图标配"つながる 仲間と出会える"；2) 房屋图标配"まなぶ 暮らしを学べる"；3) 新芽图标配"つくる 未来を共につくる"；4) 地球图标配"ひろがる 世界にひろげる"。最底部中心处包含一个圆形徽标，后接日文项目名称，下方为网站 URL：{argument name="website URL" default="www.sekaimura.com"}。右下角添加一个小型二维码，并附带微小的日文说明，提示详情请见网站。采用深海军蓝、森林绿、金色、米色和天蓝色的精致配色方案。整体风格：高端日本非营利组织海报、生态社区品牌设计、鼓舞人心、和谐、带有微妙图形设计元素的写实拼贴、平衡的排版、柔和的光晕以及杂志级的印刷质感。

name: Pumas 吉祥物体育场胜利
prompt: A dramatic ultra-realistic sports celebration photo in a packed soccer stadium, centered on a leaping anthropomorphic puma mascot in midair on the field, both fists raised in triumph while holding a huge dark navy flag with a large gold puma emblem. The mascot has tan fur, a large expressive feline head with blue eyes and black whisker markings, and wears a white soccer kit with a gold chest emblem, white shorts, dark socks, and cleats. Surround the mascot with a roaring sea of fans dressed mostly in navy and gold, filling every visible stand. Add 4 visible pyrotechnic smoke columns blasting upward around the stadium and a storm of floating gold and blue confetti throughout the frame. Include 3 prominent crowd banners and signage areas: a giant black-and-gold banner reading “PUMAS,” repeated stadium ribbon signage reading “¡PUMAS 1º LUGAR!,” and field-level advertising with “LIGA BBVA” and “¡Gooooya!”. Bright daytime sunlight, vivid contrast, crisp motion frozen at the peak of the jump, low-angle wide sports photography composition, energetic championship atmosphere, cinematic realism, highly detailed textures, sharp focus on the mascot with the crowd and stadium remaining richly legible.
promptEn: A dramatic ultra-realistic sports celebration photo in a packed soccer stadium, centered on a leaping anthropomorphic puma mascot in midair on the field, both fists raised in triumph while holding a huge dark navy flag with a large gold puma emblem. The mascot has tan fur, a large expressive feline head with blue eyes and black whisker markings, and wears a white soccer kit with a gold chest emblem, white shorts, dark socks, and cleats. Surround the mascot with a roaring sea of fans dressed mostly in navy and gold, filling every visible stand. Bright daytime sunlight, vivid contrast, crisp motion frozen at the peak of the jump, low-angle wide sports photography composition, energetic championship atmosphere, cinematic realism, highly detailed textures, sharp focus on the mascot with the crowd and stadium remaining richly legible.

name: 上海石库门窗边肖像
prompt:
A candid photograph of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} leaning on the open sill of a {argument name="architectural feature" default="tiger dormer window"} on the upper floor of a {argument name="location" default="Shanghai shikumen building"}, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment. Upper-body framing shot from below at moderate distance — she rests her forearms on the window ledge, looking out over the rooftops in the late afternoon.
East Asian young woman in her early 20s. Almond-shaped eyes with natural double eyelids, slightly elongated eye corners — gaze directed outward and slightly downward toward the lane below, soft and unhurried, the expression of someone with nowhere pressing to be. Straight refined nose with a delicate bridge. Skin tone fair to light beige (NC10–NC20) — skin subsurface scattering visible under warm golden side light, specular micro-highlights on cheekbones and nose ridge and the top of one bare shoulder, fine foundation powder grain perceptible. Clean no-makeup summer skin, peachy gloss, curl in the lash.
She wears a sage green cropped ribbed knit cami with thin adjustable straps, and a denim micro mini skirt. Fine layered gold chains at her collarbone — two of them, slightly different lengths. Hair loosely half-clipped with a claw clip, several strands falling free around her jaw. She rests her chin lightly on one hand, the other arm stretched along the window ledge — the universal posture of someone watching a street from above, neither bored nor alert, simply present in summer time. The tiger dormer window frame: old dark-painted wood, slightly weathered, panes of old glass with the faint optical distortion of age. The shikumen rooflines and chimney tops spread below. Over those old tiles, in the far blurred golden distance, the recognizable silhouettes of Shanghai Tower and the SWFC tower rise as warm amber forms in the haze — modern and historic occupying one frame without apology. Two or three stray hairs displaced by the rooftop afternoon breeze, natural unplanned imperfection, not geometrically symmetrical.
Warm low-angle golden hour sunlight from the side, amber light catching her cheekbones, the top of a bare shoulder, and the gold chain — long shadows from the window frame across her forearm. Gentle and warm, quiet contentment — the Shanghai girl's private pleasure of a summer evening seen from above the lane. Subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, photographic noise texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 2:3. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.

name: 福兔
prompt: 低视角简约镜头下，从暖金胶质的新春秘境向上铺展至橙红渐变的背景，营造出新春祈愿的简约沉浸式氛围。画面中心，“福运萌兔” 角色正乘鲤送福 —— 亮面红胶锦鲤有着细腻的 “福” 纹纹理，暖棕针织帽自然垂坠的褶皱仿若真实织物，米白毛衣质感简约亲肤，金橘胶锦鲤造型亮面如新春漆器，细节处的福纹颗粒分明。它身旁的红胶 “福” 笺亮面夺目，金胶元宝纹理清晰；周围环绕着简约新春元素，暖金胶质的云纹蓬松简约，红胶 “福” 字标识鲜艳大气；所有元素融合 3D 胶质的通透、针织的真实触感与亮面塑料的光泽，充满新春祈愿的简约趣味。“福兔玩家 新春生活简趣享” 的标语元素散落其间，背景中暖金胶质的场景带着新春质感，简约元素散发着祈愿氛围。顶部是 “[新春文创品牌]×[潮玩品牌]” 的联合标志，搭配艺术字 “[新春文创品牌]×[潮玩品牌] 福兔玩家 新春简趣享 2026 来 [新品牌] 解锁福运玩法 祈愿无界”。底部信息栏设有 “来 [新品牌名] 搜 福兔嘉年华” 图标、“福运满格 简趣无限” 标语，以及 “[新品牌搜索框] 福兔玩家” 功能模块，整体以简约新春风格将角色与场景深度融合，通过低视角构图强化视觉简约感，把新春祈愿、简趣生活与新品牌紧密绑定，营造出充满年味的简约氛围。

name: 暗黑奇幻任务路线图
prompt:
Goal: Create an epic dark-fantasy world map illustration for {argument name="project name" default="a perilous quest route"}, shown as a cinematic aerial panorama rather than a flat diagram.

Canvas: Ultra-wide 16:9 landscape image, high-resolution, dramatic matte-painting style, no border, no title text, no labels, no legend.

Layout and geography: Show one vast coastal kingdom from a high bird’s-eye view. In the lower center, place 1 enormous fortified medieval harbor city with dense rooftops, tall gothic towers, stone walls, docks, and tiny ships. To the far right, place 1 jagged volcanic island or black mountain chain with glowing orange lava and smoke. Across the upper third, place 1 massive vertical ice wall stretching horizontally across the entire land, with frozen waterfalls and sheer blue-white cliffs. Beyond the ice wall, show 1 frozen wasteland plateau full of snow, ruined towers, distant castles, and mountains under storm clouds. Between the city and the ice wall, show 1 broad dark forest region, 1 branching river delta, scattered villages, roads, ruins, and rocky hills. Surround the land with a stormy dark ocean, waves, mist, and small ships.

Route overlay: Add exactly 1 continuous glowing red hand-drawn travel route line, thin but bright, with small white-edged red arrowheads. The route begins near the harbor city, travels across the sea toward the volcanic island, then bends back to the city, winds north through the walled city, crosses wetlands and forests, passes through a narrow gate or gap in the ice wall, and continues as a winding path across the frozen plateau toward the distant north. Include exactly 13 visible arrowheads along the route: 3 over the sea toward the volcano and back, 3 around and inside the harbor city approach, 3 through the forested central land, 1 at the ice-wall passage, and 3 across the snowy northern plateau.

Visual style: Hyper-detailed cinematic fantasy concept art, realistic scale, desaturated blue-gray palette, cold storm lighting, moody clouds, volumetric fog, sharp terrain detail, miniature architectural detail, glowing lava contrast, crisp red route overlay like a strategic campaign map. The mood should feel dangerous, epic, and suitable for a fantasy game reveal or quest-planning visual.

Constraints: No readable text anywhere, no UI panels, no compass rose, no character closeups, no modern buildings, no watermark. Keep the red route clearly visible without making it look like a road; it should sit on top of the painted map as an annotated quest path.

name: 中国风鎏金书法文字
prompt: 书法字体海报，主体文字“發财”，狂野奔放的草书字体，视觉张力十足，富有动感： 1. **字体风格：** 超粗笔画，流畅飘逸，极具力量感；笔画巧妙延长、变形、缠绕，展现草书的韵律；明显的飞白效果，体现书写速度与干笔触感；整体潇洒不羁。 2. **文字效果：** **鎏金质感**，具有金属光泽和厚重感，金色中带有微妙的深浅变化和熔金流动感，仿佛熔化的黄金书写而成，边缘可略带泼溅金箔效果。 3. **背景：** **带细微噪点的黑色肌理背景**，类似粗布、深色砂砾或老旧纸张的纹理，提供强烈的明暗对比，突出鎏金文字，质感粗糙但干净不杂乱。 4. **构图与点缀：** * “發财”作为绝对视觉中心，占据大部分画面。 * 英文“The Promise” 和 说明文字 “Calligraphy Font Design” 以及署名 “@ invi design” **作为次要元素，以小号字体精心排列在画面四周边缘**（例如左下角、右下角、左上角或右上角），颜色采用弱化的浅金色或灰白色，不喧宾夺主，起装饰和标注作用。 5. **整体氛围：** 大师级海报作品，融合传统书法艺术与现代设计感，神秘、奢华且充满能量。画面干净，焦点清晰，强烈的黑色背景与闪耀的鎏金字体形成极致对比。
promptEn: 书法字体海报，主体文字“發财”，狂野奔放的草书字体，视觉张力十足，富有动感： 1. **字体风格：** 超粗笔画，流畅飘逸，极具力量感；笔画巧妙延长、变形、缠绕，展现草书的韵律；明显的飞白效果，体现书写速度与干笔触感；整体潇洒不羁。 2. **文字效果：** **鎏金质感**，具有金属光泽和厚重感，金色中带有微妙的深浅变化和熔金流动感，仿佛熔化的黄金书写而成，边缘可略带泼溅金箔效果。 3. **背景：** **带细微噪点的黑色肌理背景**，类似粗布、深色砂砾或老旧纸张的纹理，提供强烈的明暗对比，突出鎏金文字，质感粗糙但干净不杂乱。 4. **构图与点缀：** * “發财”作为绝对视觉中心，占据大部分画面。 * 英文“The Promise” 和 说明文字 “Calligraphy Font Design” 以及署名 “@ invi design” **作为次要元素，以小号字体精心排列在画面四周边缘**（例如左下角、右下角、左上角或右上角），颜色采用弱化的浅金色或灰白色，不喧宾夺主，起装饰和标注作用。 5. **整体氛围：** 大师级海报作品，融合传统书法艺术与现代设计感，神秘、奢华且充满能量。画面干净，焦点清晰，强烈的黑色背景与闪耀的鎏金字体形成极致对比。

name: Watercolor style; autumn Parisian coffee shop
prompt: Wet watercolor washes blur the ginkgo trees, where the yellow paint drips naturally into a rain of fallen leaves. The coffee house' outdoor seating is coated in a thin layer of cobalt blue, leaving the iron chairs to bleach in the sunlight. The steam from the latte is gently wiped with a dry brush, blending with the morning mist. The spire of the Notre Dame Cathedral in the distance is outlined with burnt ink, the edges deliberately blurred, as if the bells shattered the. The entire painting is crisscrossed with water marks, as if the Seine River folds autumn into the paper grain.
promptEn: Wet watercolor washes blur the ginkgo trees, where the yellow paint drips naturally into a rain of fallen leaves. The coffee house' outdoor seating is coated in a thin layer of cobalt blue, leaving the iron chairs to bleach in the sunlight. The steam from the latte is gently wiped with a dry brush, blending with the morning mist. The spire of the Notre Dame Cathedral in the distance is outlined with burnt ink, the edges deliberately blurred, as if the bells shattered the. The entire painting is crisscrossed with water marks, as if the Seine River folds autumn into the paper grain.

name: 雨中骑行的橘猫
prompt: Create a cinematic, ultra-detailed single-scene image of a cute {argument name="animal" default="orange tabby cat"} riding a {argument name="scooter color" default="yellow"} vintage Vespa-style scooter through a rainy Japanese city street. The cat is upright like a tiny commuter, with realistic fluffy orange-and-white fur, wide expressive eyes, white paws on the handlebars, and a striped tail visible behind the scooter. It wears {argument name="accessories" default="large yellow headphones, a thick mustard-yellow scarf, a transparent hooded raincoat, a yellow tote bag, and yellow clogs"}. The scooter headlight is glowing warmly, water droplets bead on the clear raincoat and scooter body, and the wet asphalt reflects headlights and lane markings. The background shows a misty urban road with passing cars, guardrails, greenery, utility poles, and Japanese traffic signs softened by rain and shallow depth of field. Use cozy slice-of-life anime realism with Studio Ghibli-inspired warmth, photoreal fur detail, believable rain physics, soft gray overcast lighting, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, reflective roads, and 4K movie-quality detail.

name: 月光守护者阳台
prompt: Create a vertical fantasy background illustration in a dark romantic gothic style, viewed from a high stone balcony at night. The scene overlooks a vast illuminated castle city with many spires and warm window lights beneath a cloudy deep-blue sky and a bright full moon. In the left foreground place two massive weathered stone columns wrapped with ivy and vines, a black cloak or mantle draped over a chair or railing, and one glowing brass lantern on a wooden chest. Across the lower foreground place one aged parchment map spread on a dark wooden table, one ornate dagger with emerald accents lying diagonally across it, one black leather glove beside it, two rolled scrolls tied with cord, one small metal cup or inkwell near the balcony ledge, one decorative locked treasure chest on the right, and one potted flowering plant with white blossoms. Use warm candlelight in the foreground contrasting with cool moonlight over the distant city, creating a quiet protective mood. Add a short vertical Japanese message on the left column in elegant white serif calligraphy, arranged as two vertical text columns, reading {argument name="message text" default="静かな刃は、君を守る。"}. Make the setting feel like {argument name="setting mood" default="a silent guardian's lookout over a royal capital"}, with {argument name="main foreground item" default="an emerald-inlaid dagger"} as the visual focus, {argument name="sky condition" default="moonlit clouds"}, and {argument name="city style" default="gothic fantasy castle city"}. No characters are visible.

Use warm candlelight in the foreground contrasting with cool moonlight over the distant city, creating a quiet protective mood. prompt: 创建一个全页面的蒸汽朋克风格视频平台主页模型，采用深古铜色、黄铜色和棕褐色调，设计风格如同维多利亚工业版的 YouTube。界面应呈纵向布局，类似于海报或网站截图，并以齿轮、管道、雕刻金属边框、花丝、仪表、螺丝和发光的爱迪生灯泡进行装饰。在左上角放置一个现代风格的叠加 Logo，文字为"Pollo AI"，下方附有较小的"GPT Image 2"字样。在页面中心放置主标题，使用大型华丽的衬线字体："{argument name="site name" default="ElectroVid"}"，下方配有一行较小的雕刻风格标语："{argument name="tagline" default="THE FUTURE IN MOTION"}"。在标题下方添加一个水平导航栏，包含 6 个项目：一个主页图标按钮、"TRENDING"（热门）、"INNOVATIONS"（创新）、"DOCUMENTARIES"（纪录片）、"ENTERTAINMENT"（娱乐），以及右侧的搜索框，显示占位符"Search ElectroVid..."和一个搜索图标。在左侧边栏，添加一个名为"POPULAR CHANNELS"（热门频道）的部分，包含 3 个垂直堆叠的频道卡片，配有圆形徽章和订阅按钮：1) "THE PATENT OFFICE"（专利局），显示"27.4K SUBSCRIBERS"；2) "THE ROYAL SOCIETY"（皇家学会），显示"18.7K SUBSCRIBERS"；3) "GENERAL ELECTRIC"（通用电气），显示"35.1K SUBSCRIBERS"。每张卡片应配有一个华丽的复古徽章 Logo 和一个标有"SUBSCRIBE"（订阅）的矩形按钮。在主要内容区域，放置一个大型精选视频播放器，画面为棕褐色调，展示两名 19 世纪末的发明家穿着西装，在写有"AC vs. DC"字样和闪电图案的黑板前争论；一人指向黑板，另一人做出回应，桌上放着一个灯泡和早期电气设备。刻意用柔和的矩形模糊块遮挡两人的面部。添加视频进度条、播放控件和时间戳"08:47 / 22:31"。在播放器下方，显示视频标题"{argument name="featured title" default="The Truth About AC vs. DC: The Final Debate"}"。下方包含一行频道信息，配有圆形头像、频道名称"The Electrical Age"、元数据"142K views • 3 days ago"，右侧是一个标有"LIKE"（点赞）的按钮，计数为"5.8K"。在此下方，添加一个部分标题"LATEST VIDEOS"（最新视频），并在一行中放置 3 个视频缩略图。缩略图 1：托马斯·爱迪生手持发光灯泡的棕褐色肖像，面部被模糊块遮挡，时长"10:12"，标题"My New Incandescent Bulb"，创作者"Thomas Edison"，元数据"89K views • 5 days ago"。缩略图 2：沃登克里弗塔在闪电下的戏剧性棕褐色图像，时长"15:36"，标题"The Wonders of the Wardenclyffe Tower"，创作者"Nikola Tesla"，元数据"120K views • 1 week ago"。缩略图 3：亨利·福特坐在早期汽车里的棕褐色照片，时长"12:08"，标题"The Automobile Revolution"，创作者"Henry Ford"，元数据"110K views • 1 week ago"。在缩略图下方，添加一个居中的金属按钮，标注为"VIEW ALL VIDEOS"（查看所有视频）。在底部页脚，第一行包含文字"© 1893 {argument name="company name" default="ElectroVid, Ltd."}"，下一行包含"All rights reserved."。在右上角和右下角添加装饰性压力表，并在左下角添加外露管道和一个大齿轮。使整个设计高度精细、对称、具有触感且富有电影感，融合雕刻纹理、陈旧的纸张面板、黄铜高光、柔和温暖的灯泡光芒，以及融入复古 UI 的清晰易读的排版。

prompt: 一位神态安详、如梦似幻的女子漂浮在一池清澈湛蓝的静水中，四周环绕着荷花与纤柔的花瓣。她乌黑的长发上戴着一顶由白紫色花朵编织而成的精美花冠，点缀着金色的装饰。她将下巴轻托在手掌上，脸上浮现出柔和而恍惚的神情， 双眼轻阖，尽显宁静与优雅。她身着一袭淡蓝与白色交织的飘逸半透明长裙，裙摆如水波般在她周身翻涌，与周围的水体浑然一体。背景中是一片神秘的森林，树木泛着微光，飞瀑倾泻而下，更添几分超凡脱俗的氛围。光线穿透画面，在水面和她的肌肤上投下柔和的倒影与闪烁的光斑，将自然与幻想完美地交融在一起。

name: 迷雾悬崖骡道
prompt: Create a hyper-realistic collectible fine-art documentary landscape photograph inspired by ancient Chinese mountain travel writings: a lone traveler and one pack mule moving along a perilous cliffside plank road carved into a sheer rock wall in {argument name="location" default="a remote misty Chinese mountain gorge"}. The image is a wide horizontal frame, shot from behind and slightly to the left on the narrow path, with the dark vertical cliff face dominating the entire left third of the composition and a vast abyss opening to the right. The path is made of uneven wet stone slabs and old wooden support beams jutting out from the cliff, with rough dirt, broken edges, and no railing; count exactly 2 living subjects on the path: 1 human traveler in muted earth-toned traditional mountain clothing and 1 brown pack mule carrying bundled cargo. The traveler is small in scale, walking away from the camera beside the mule, emphasizing danger, solitude, and the immensity of nature. Across the right and center background, show multiple jagged limestone peaks and steep forested cliffs fading into layers of dense white-gray fog and low cloud, with swirling mist pouring through the valley below. Use a cold, moody, overcast atmosphere after rain, wet rock textures, deep shadows, desaturated blue-gray and charcoal tones with subtle green vegetation. Make it look like a real photograph taken by a top National Geographic or fine-art landscape photographer, with natural light, high dynamic range, sharp foreground detail, atmospheric depth, cinematic realism, no fantasy architecture, no modern objects, no text, no watermark. Camera feel: {argument name="camera feel" default="full-frame documentary photography, 28mm wide-angle lens, f/8, natural overcast light"}. Overall mood: {argument name="mood" default="awe, danger, ancient journey, and lonely grandeur"}.

prompt: 3D illustration of A beautiful spring scenery with grass, flowers and small rocks on the ground, blue sky, sunshine and clouds in background, green hills and meadows. There is a river flowing through it. On top theres two big stones. Pixar style.
promptEn: A beautiful spring landscape in Pixar style, featuring lush green grass, blooming flowers, and scattered small rocks on the ground. The sky is a clear blue with fluffy white clouds. Sunlight filters through, casting gentle shadows. In the distance, rolling green hills and meadows stretch out. A serene river winds its way through the scene. On top of the composition, two large stones sit prominently, adding texture and interest. The scene is filled with vibrant colors and dynamic lighting, creating a lively and enchanting atmosphere.
